<?php namespace Spatie\Backup\Config; use Spatie\Backup\Support\Data; class MonitoredBackupsConfig extends Data { /** * @param array<MonitoredBackupConfig> $monitorBackups */ protected function __construct( public array $monitorBackups, ) {} /** @param array<mixed> $data */ public static function fromArray(array $data): self { return new self( monitorBackups: collect($data) ->map(fn (array $monitoredBackup) => MonitoredBackupConfig::fromArray($monitoredBackup)) ->toArray(), ); } }
